task_description: Overhaul NeuroX v9 trading strategy: remove EMA 15 crossover (use only price vs EMA 9 for direction), add world-class choppy market filter, implement candle-close exit system with swing SL, $5 breakeven logic, and advanced M1 reversal detection for early loss cutting.

verification.summary: 393 tests pass. 20 pre-existing failures (unrelated: spread_signal.py missing Config attrs, tick_collector encoding on Linux, optimizer floating point, performance MIN_LOT_SIZE). All 150 targeted tests for the new features pass. Tests exercise real logic: candle close detection, breakeven trigger, reversal detection, swing level computation, choppy filter voting.
